3056 struct {
3057 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3058 } _0;
3059 struct {
3060 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3061 } temporary;
3062 } *ban_type_data;
3063 } banned;

3090 } players_list_friends;
3091 } *reply_code_data;
3092} InitInitServerPacket;

3256 } select_character;

3259 Weight weight;
3260 size_t items_length;
3261 Item *items;
3262 size_t spells_length;
3263 Spell *spells;

3265 } enter_game;
3266 } *welcome_code_data;

4789typedef struct RecoverAgreeServerPacket {

4801} RecoverListServerPacket;

4804EoResult RecoverListServerPacket_deserialize(RecoverListServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4805
4806typedef struct RecoverReplyServerPacket {
4807 int32_t experience;
4808 int32_t karma;
4813 bool has_level_up;
4814 int32_t level_up;
4818 bool has_stat_points;
4819 int32_t stat_points;
4823 bool has_skill_points;
4824 int32_t skill_points;
4825} RecoverReplyServerPacket;
4826
4827EoResult RecoverReplyServerPacket_serialize(const RecoverReplyServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);
4828EoResult RecoverReplyServerPacket_deserialize(RecoverReplyServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4829
4830typedef struct RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket {
4831 int32_t stat_points;
4832 int32_t skill_points;
4833 int32_t max_hp;
4834 int32_t max_tp;
4835 int32_t max_sp;
4836} RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket;
4837
4838EoResult RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket_serialize(const RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);
4839EoResult RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket_deserialize(RecoverTargetGroupServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4840
4841typedef struct EffectUseServerPacket {
4842 MapEffect effect;
4843 union {
4844 struct {
4845 int32_t quake_strength;
4846 } quake;
4847 } *effect_data;
4848} EffectUseServerPacket;
4849
4850EoResult EffectUseServerPacket_serialize(const EffectUseServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);
4851EoResult EffectUseServerPacket_deserialize(EffectUseServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4852

4859EoResult EffectAgreeServerPacket_deserialize(EffectAgreeServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4860
4861typedef struct EffectTargetOtherServerPacket {
4862 int32_t damage;
4863 int32_t hp;
4864 int32_t max_hp;
4865 size_t others_length;
4866 MapDrainDamageOther *others;
4867} EffectTargetOtherServerPacket;
4868
4869EoResult EffectTargetOtherServerPacket_serialize(const EffectTargetOtherServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);

4871

4873EoResult EffectReportServerPacket_deserialize(EoReader *reader);
4874
4875typedef struct EffectSpecServerPacket {
4876 MapDamageType map_damage_type;
4877 union {
4878 struct {
4879 int32_t tp_damage;
4880 int32_t tp;
4881 int32_t max_tp;
4882 } tp_drain;
4883 struct {
4884 int32_t hp_damage;
4885 int32_t hp;
4886 int32_t max_hp;
4887 } spikes;
4888 } *map_damage_type_data;
4889} EffectSpecServerPacket;
4890
4891EoResult EffectSpecServerPacket_serialize(const EffectSpecServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);
4892EoResult EffectSpecServerPacket_deserialize(EffectSpecServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
4893
4894typedef struct EffectAdminServerPacket {

4899} EffectAdminServerPacket;
4900
